name: Forest Botanicals
description: Dried leaves, bark, and botanical products harvested from forest ecosystems

name: Seeds & Nuts
description: Forest seeds and nuts used in food, oil extraction, and industrial applications

name: Flowers & Buds
description: Dried forest flowers used in food, beverages, and traditional medicine

name: Honey & Bee Products
description: Wild forest honey and bee-derived products from natural hive collections

name: Bamboo Products
description: Processed bamboo shoots and bamboo-derived food and craft materials

name: Medicinal Herbs
description: Dried herbs and plant parts used in traditional and Ayurvedic medicine

name: Roots & Rhizomes
description: Forest-sourced roots, rhizomes, and tubers with culinary and medicinal value

name: Dried Fruits & Berries
description: Forest fruits dried and processed for wholesale distribution

name: Gums & Resins
description: Lac, shellac, and natural gum resins harvested from forest trees
